localization.name: Angry Strike
localization.description: 900% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user has Beast Anger. Removes Beast Anger after use.
localization.selected: 900% damage, usable if user has Beast Anger

localization.name: Fury Thunder
localization.description: Stun 2 enemies for 200TU. Usable only if the user has Beast Fury. Removes Beast Fury after use.
localization.selected: Stuns targets for 200TU, usable if user has Beast Fury

localization.name: Wrathful Glare
localization.description: Grants 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU. Sleep cannot be applied to a unit that Has Slept while on the battlefield. Usable only if the user has Beast Wrath. Removes Beast Wrath after use.
localization.selected:
Puts the targets to sleep, usable if user has Beast Wrath
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Prey Upon
localization.description: Sacrifices one ally on the battlefield to grant the user 1 of 3 Beast effects, which unlocks other skills. Sacrificing a Zeregia will grant Beast Anger, sacrificing a Dairyu will grant Beast Fury, and sacrificing a Beryx will grant Beast Wrath.
localization.selected: Sacrifices 1 ally in battle to gain Beast Anger, Fury, or Wrath

localization.name: Summon Prey
localization.description: Adds 1 Zeregia, 1 Dairyu, and 1 Beryx to the front of the allied reinforcements. Usable only if the user has no allies on the battlefield.
localization.selected: Adds prey to front of allied reinforcements, usable if alone

localization.name: Hungry Rage
localization.description: 1000% damage to all enemies. Usable only if the user has no allies on the battlefield.
localization.selected: 1000% damage to targets, usable if user is last alive

localization.name: Time Punisher
localization.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies if they have 200TU or more in the turn order. Enemy team loses 3 spirit.

localization.name: Dream Drain
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping. User heals 5% of its max HP.
localization.selected: 500% damage against sleeping target. User heals HP

localization.name: Attack
localization.description: Damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 2 Spirit.
localization.selected: Damage to 1 enemy and gains 2 Spirit

localization.name: Hold Ground
localization.description: If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

localization.name: Immovable
localization.description: This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: Stun Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by stun effects.
